tiles.title: Leads go cold in minutes
tiles.body: A prospect who waits 2 hours for a reply has already called the next business on the list.

tiles.title: Calls get missed every day
tiles.body: You're with a client, on a job, or mid-cleaning, and the phone rings into voicemail nobody checks.

tiles.title: Manual follow-up eats your week
tiles.body: Quotes sent, reminders to make, reviews to chase, all landing back on the one person running the business.
